Name: Shopify Order Automation Workflow
Description: Automates Shopify order processing integrating Zoho CRM, Trello, Gmail, Mailchimp, and Harvest. It updates CRM contacts, creates tasks, sends conditional emails, tags customers, and generates invoices to streamline order management.

Name: Shopify Fulfillment to Onfleet Task Automation
Description: Automates task creation in Onfleet upon new Shopify fulfillment via Shopify Trigger node and Onfleet API. Seamlessly integrates Shopify and Onfleet for streamlined delivery task management in n8n workflow.

Name: Shopify to Google Sheets Product Sync
Description: Automates syncing Shopify product data (title, tags, description, price) to Google Sheets using Shopify GraphQL API and Google Sheets API. Includes pagination, cursor tracking, daily schedule, and incremental updates for efficient product management.

Name: Weekly Shopify Sales Report Automation
Description: Automates weekly extraction of Shopify orders, calculates total orders and revenue, records data in Google Sheets, and posts a summary to a Slack channel. Uses Shopify API, Google Sheets API via OAuth2, Slack API, and n8n Cron trigger.

Name: Sync Shopify Customers to Zendesk Contacts
Description: Automates syncing updated customer data from Shopify to Zendesk by matching email addresses, creating new Zendesk users or updating existing ones including phone numbers. Uses Shopify webhook triggers and Zendesk API integration in n8n workflow.

Name: Shopify to Zendesk Order Ticket Sync
Description: Automates creation and tracking of Zendesk support tickets for updated Shopify orders using Shopify webhook and Zendesk API. Checks existing tickets by order ID to avoid duplicates, creating new tickets for new orders to streamline customer support workflows.

Name: Shopify to Mautic New Customer Sync
Description: Automates syncing new Shopify customers to Mautic as contacts using Shopify webhook and Mautic API integration in n8n. Ensures first name, last name, and email transfer seamlessly for marketing automation.

Name: Shopify Orders to Google Sheets Sync
Description: Automates retrieving Shopify store orders using Shopify API, handles pagination with page_info, and appends/upserts order data (id, note, email, processed_at) into Google Sheets via Google Sheets API. Includes scheduling and manual triggers.

Name: Shopify Automated Fulfillment Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow automating Shopify order fulfillment by fetching unfulfilled orders, filtering those older than 24 hours, retrieving fulfillment orders via Shopify API, and marking them fulfilled with customer notification. Uses Shopify REST API and n8n core nodes.

Name: Shopify to Odoo Product Sync
Description: Automates syncing of new Shopify products to Odoo ERP by detecting new product creation events via Shopify API webhook and updating/creating matching products in Odoo using its API. Built with n8n using Shopify Trigger, Odoo nodes, and custom JS code.

Name: Shopify to HubSpot Order Deal Sync
Description: Automates syncing of Shopify order updates with HubSpot CRM by creating/updating contacts and deals using Shopify API, HubSpot API and OAuth2. Ensures orders in Shopify reflect as deals in HubSpot, streamlining ecommerce sales workflows.

Name: Shopify Orders UTM Data to Baserow
Description: Automates daily extraction of Shopify orders with UTM parameters using Shopify GraphQL API. Transforms and filters data, then stores enriched order details in Baserow database. Utilizes n8n integration workflows with Shopify API and Baserow API for marketing attribution tracking.

Name: Shopify to Odoo Customer Sync
Description: Automates syncing of new Shopify customers to Odoo CRM contacts using Shopify webhook trigger and Odoo API integration for contact creation and deduplication.

Name: Shopify Inventory Alert to Discord
Description: Automates Shopify inventory monitoring via webhooks and GraphQL API. Sends low stock or out-of-stock alerts with product info and images to Discord channels using Discord Bot API, enabling timely inventory management.

Name: Shopify-Mautic Marketing Consent Sync
Description: Automates syncing customer marketing consent and segment membership between Shopify and Mautic using Shopify webhooks, Mautic API (OAuth2), Shopify GraphQL API, and webhook signature validation for secure marketing preference management.

Name: Shopify to D365 Business Central Order Sync
Description: Automates syncing Shopify orders to Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central by creating sales orders or invoices via Business Central REST API. Utilizes n8n, Shopify API, and OAuth2-secured Business Central endpoints for customer lookup, order processing, and fulfillment integration.

Name: Shopify Customers to Google Sheets Exporter
Description: Automates fetching Shopify customers via Shopify API, handles pagination, and appends/upserts customer data (email, first name, last name, ID) to a Google Sheets document. Uses n8n with Shopify API, Google Sheets OAuth2, JavaScript for pagination parsing.

Name: Shopify Product Launch Social Broadcaster
Description: Automates social media announcements for new Shopify products by posting customizable messages to Twitter and Telegram using Shopify Trigger, Twitter API, and Telegram API integration in n8n workflow.

Name: Shopify New Order Trigger
Description: An n8n workflow that uses Shopify API to trigger on new orders creation in a Shopify store. It leverages Shopify webhook to automate workflows based on new order events, useful for order processing and notifications.

Name: Shopify Products Fetcher
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers manually to fetch all products from a Shopify store using Shopify API credentials. It helps automate retrieval of product data for e-commerce operations.

Name: Shopify Campaign Image Uploader
Description: Automates updating Shopify theme assets by uploading campaign images via Shopify GraphQL and REST APIs using n8n. Integrates Baserow webhook for triggers and supports dynamic content injection into Liquid templates.

Name: Squarespace to Shopify Customer Sync via Google Sheets
Description: Automates conversion of Squarespace profile data to Shopify customer format using Google Sheets for data handling. Uses n8n webhook to receive submissions, processes data in batches, and updates Shopify customers and Squarespace profiles in Google Sheets seamlessly.

Name: Shopify Tag Updater on Onfleet Delayed Tasks
Description: Automates updating Shopify product tags based on Onfleet delivery task delays using Onfleet webhook triggers and Shopify API integration to synchronize delivery status with product metadata.

Name: Shopify Order to WhatsApp AI Alert
Description: Automatically monitors new Shopify orders, uses AI to summarize the order details, and sends a smart WhatsApp notification to the store owner or fulfillment team. Uses Shopify API, OpenAI, and WhatsApp Cloud API.
